SubLayerProcessing.SqlScript:
SELECT 
	RosterMonth AS reportMonth,
	PlanMemberID AS planMemberID,
	providerID,
	ClientName AS clientCode,
	ReportingLevel AS reportingLevel,
	memberMBI AS memberBeneficiaryID,
	memberLastName,
	memberFirstName,
	memberMiddleName,
	memberDOB,
	MemberPhoneNumber AS memberPhone,
	providerNPI,
	providerLastName,
	providerFirstName,
	providerMiddleName,
	providerAddress1,
	providerAddress2,
	providerCity,
	providerState,
	providerZipCode AS providerZip,
	ProviderPhoneNumber AS providerPhone,
	practiceCode,
	practiceName,
	POCode AS poCode,
	POName AS poName,
	PlanType AS planID,
	MemberPlanEligibilityStart AS memberPlanEligibilityStartDate,
	NewPECMember AS isNewPECMember,
	ProgramType AS programType,
	FileID,
	sha2(
		concat(IfNull(RosterMonth,"")
		,"|",IfNull(PlanMemberID,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerID,"")
		,"|",IfNull(ClientName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(ReportingLevel,"")
		,"|",IfNull(memberMBI,"")
		,"|",IfNull(memberLastName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(memberFirstName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(memberMiddleName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(memberDOB,"")
		,"|",IfNull(MemberPhoneNumber,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerNPI,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerLastName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerFirstName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerMiddleName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerAddress1,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerAddress2,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerCity,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerState,"")
		,"|",IfNull(providerZipCode,"")
		,"|",IfNull(ProviderPhoneNumber,"")
		,"|",IfNull(practiceCode,"")
		,"|",IfNull(practiceName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(POCode,"")
		,"|",IfNull(POName,"")
		,"|",IfNull(PlanType,"")
		,"|",IfNull(MemberPlanEligibilityStart,"")
		,"|",IfNull(CAST(NewPECMember AS STRING),"")
		,"|",IfNull(ProgramType,"")
		,"|",IfNull(FileID,"") 
		), 256) AS HashKey 
FROM cMemberRoster
WHERE
FileID = (SELECT MAX(FileID) FROM cMemberRoster)
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
SELECT  
  clientCode
 ,reportMonth
 ,planMemberID
 ,providerNPI
FROM tempSQLScript 
GROUP BY
  clientCode
 ,reportMonth
 ,planMemberID
 ,providerNPI
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
LIMIT(3)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
WITH THIS AS(
SELECT
  ifnull(ss.reportMonth,dt.reportMonth) AS reportMonth,
  ifnull(ss.planMemberID,dt.planMemberID) AS planMemberID,
  ifnull(ss.providerID,dt.providerID) AS providerID,
  ifnull(ss.clientCode,dt.clientCode) AS clientCode,
  ifnull(ss.reportingLevel,dt.reportingLevel) AS reportingLevel,
  ifnull(ss.memberBeneficiaryID,dt.memberBeneficiaryID) AS memberBeneficiaryID,
  ifnull(ss.memberLastName,dt.memberLastName) AS memberLastName,
  ifnull(ss.memberFirstName,dt.memberFirstName) AS memberFirstName,
  ifnull(ss.memberMiddleName,dt.memberMiddleName) AS memberMiddleName,
  ifnull(ss.memberDOB,dt.memberDOB) AS memberDOB,
  ifnull(ss.memberPhone,dt.memberPhone) AS memberPhone,
  ifnull(ss.providerNPI,dt.providerNPI) AS providerNPI,
  ifnull(ss.providerLastName,dt.providerLastName) AS providerLastName,
  ifnull(ss.providerFirstName,dt.providerFirstName) AS providerFirstName,
  ifnull(ss.providerMiddleName,dt.providerMiddleName) AS providerMiddleName,
  ifnull(ss.providerAddress1,dt.providerAddress1) AS providerAddress1,
  ifnull(ss.providerAddress2,dt.providerAddress2) AS providerAddress2,
  ifnull(ss.providerCity,dt.providerCity) AS providerCity,
  ifnull(ss.providerState,dt.providerState) AS providerState,
  ifnull(ss.providerZip,dt.providerZip) AS providerZip,
  ifnull(ss.providerPhone,dt.providerPhone) AS providerPhone,
  ifnull(ss.practiceCode,dt.practiceCode) AS practiceCode,
  ifnull(ss.practiceName,dt.practiceName) AS practiceName,
  ifnull(ss.poCode,dt.poCode) AS poCode,
  ifnull(ss.poName,dt.poName) AS poName,
  ifnull(ss.planID,dt.planID) AS planID,
  ifnull(ss.memberPlanEligibilityStartDate,dt.memberPlanEligibilityStartDate) AS memberPlanEligibilityStartDate,
  ifnull(ss.isNewPECMember,dt.isNewPECMember) AS isNewPECMember,
  ifnull(ss.ProgramType,dt.ProgramType) AS ProgramType,
  ifnull(ss.FileID,dt.FileID) AS FileID,
  ifnull(ss.HashKey,dt.HashKey) AS HashKey,
  CASE
    WHEN ss.FileID IS NULL THEN 0 --delete
    WHEN ss.FileID = dt.FileID AND ss.HashKey = dt.HashKey THEN 1 --Update
    ELSE 2 --insert
  END AS flag
FROM tempSQLScript ss
  FULL OUTER JOIN  DestinationTable dt
    ON ss.FileID = dt.FileID
      AND ifnull(ss.clientCode, "")  = ifnull(dt.clientCode, "")
      AND ifnull(ss.reportMonth, "") = ifnull(dt.reportMonth, "")
      AND ifnull(ss.planMemberID,"") = ifnull(dt.planMemberID,"")
      AND ifnull(ss.providerNPI,"") = ifnull(dt.providerNPI,"")
      AND ss.FileID = dt.FileID
)
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * from THIS) s
  ON s.FileID = t.FileID
      AND ifnull(s.clientCode, "")  = ifnull(t.clientCode, "")
      AND ifnull(s.reportMonth, "") = ifnull(t.reportMonth, "")
      AND ifnull(s.planMemberID,"") = ifnull(t.planMemberID,"")
      AND ifnull(s.providerNPI,"") = ifnull(t.providerNPI,"")
WHEN MATCHED AND flag = 0 THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED AND flag = 1 THEN UPDATE
  SET  t.providerID=s.providerID,
       t.reportingLevel=s.reportingLevel,
       t.memberBeneficiaryID=s.memberBeneficiaryID,
       t.memberLastName=s.memberLastName,
       t.memberFirstName=s.memberFirstName,
       t.memberMiddleName=s.memberMiddleName,
       t.memberDOB=s.memberDOB,
       t.memberPhone=s.memberPhone,
       t.providerLastName=s.providerLastName,
       t.providerFirstName=s.providerFirstName,
       t.providerMiddleName=s.providerMiddleName,
       t.providerAddress1=s.providerAddress1,
       t.providerAddress2=s.providerAddress2,
       t.providerCity=s.providerCity,
       t.providerState=s.providerState,
       t.providerZip=s.providerZip,
       t.providerPhone=s.providerPhone,
       t.practiceCode=s.practiceCode,
       t.practiceName=s.practiceName,
       t.poCode=s.poCode,
       t.poName=s.poName,
       t.planID=s.planID,
       t.memberPlanEligibilityStartDate=s.memberPlanEligibilityStartDate,
       t.isNewPECMember=s.isNewPECMember,
       t.ProgramType=s.ProgramType,
       t.FileID=s.FileID,
       t.HashKey=s.HashKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
        reportMonth
       ,planMemberID
       ,providerID
       ,clientCode
       ,reportingLevel
       ,memberBeneficiaryID
       ,memberLastName
       ,memberFirstName
       ,memberMiddleName
       ,memberDOB
       ,memberPhone
       ,providerNPI
       ,providerLastName
       ,providerFirstName
       ,providerMiddleName
       ,providerAddress1
       ,providerAddress2
       ,providerCity
       ,providerState
       ,providerZip
       ,providerPhone
       ,practiceCode
       ,practiceName
       ,poCode
       ,poName
       ,planID
       ,memberPlanEligibilityStartDate
       ,isNewPECMember
       ,ProgramType 
       ,FileID
       ,HashKey
) VALUES (
        s.reportMonth
       ,s.planMemberID
       ,s.providerID
       ,s.clientCode
       ,s.reportingLevel
       ,s.memberBeneficiaryID
       ,s.memberLastName
       ,s.memberFirstName
       ,s.memberMiddleName
       ,s.memberDOB
       ,s.memberPhone
       ,s.providerNPI
       ,s.providerLastName
       ,s.providerFirstName
       ,s.providerMiddleName
       ,s.providerAddress1
       ,s.providerAddress2
       ,s.providerCity
       ,s.providerState
       ,s.providerZip
       ,s.providerPhone
       ,s.practiceCode
       ,s.practiceName
       ,s.poCode
       ,s.poName
       ,s.planID
       ,s.memberPlanEligibilityStartDate
       ,s.isNewPECMember
       ,s.ProgramType
       ,s.FileID
       ,s.HashKey)
